ai.name: Loan Assistant
ai.greeting1: Hi Alex! 👋 Great to see you. I'm your loan assistant — think of me as your co-pilot, here whenever you need a hand.
ai.greeting2: Good news: your refinance is moving right along — you're in review and on track to close by Aug 15. Nice work getting this far!
ai.greeting3: Just 2 quick things left on your side: pop in 2 months of bank statements, and sign your disclosures. Want me to open them for you?
ai.greeting4: Oh — and your rate is locked in at a nice 6.75%. That lock holds for 6 more days, so no rush, but let's keep the ball rolling. 🙂

quick.todo: What's left for me to do?
quick.payment: What will I pay each month?

replies.todo: Just 2 little things! 📄 Add 2 months of bank statements (all pages), then sign your disclosures. Do those and we're off to underwriting — I'll cheer you on.
replies.rate: Looking good! 🔒 You're locked at 6.75% (5.937% APR), and it holds for 6 more days. Plenty of time — and if you ever need more, just say the word and I'll ask Jordan.
replies.who: You're in great hands with Jordan Miles (NMLS #1874203) — 12 years in, 4.9★ from borrowers. Tap the JM bubble to say hi, or peek at the full profile anytime.
replies.status: You're cruising along — step 2 of 5, on track to close Aug 15. Wrap up your 2 tasks and we keep the momentum going. 🎉
replies.payment: You're looking at about $2,367 a month on your $520,000 loan (principal & interest at 6.75%). Taxes and insurance are on top of that.
replies.default: Happy to help! 🙂 I can walk you through what's left, your rate, who you're working with, or your payment — just pick one above or type away.

officer.name: Jordan Miles
officer.greeting1: Hi! I'm Jordan, your loan officer. I'll be helping you through your application — reach out here anytime.
officer.greeting2: I noticed you started the assets section. Any questions as you pull your statements together?

replies.documents: Great question — two months of statements for every account, all pages included. You can upload them right from the Documents tab.
replies.rates: Happy to walk through rates. Once your application is complete I can pull live options and we'll pick a lock window together.
replies.time: Most applications take about 10–15 minutes. After you submit, I typically review within one business day.
replies.default: Thanks — I've got that noted. I'll follow up shortly. Anything else I can help with in the meantime?

peek.greeting: Hi! I'm Jordan, your loan officer. Reach out anytime — happy to help with your loan.
